facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Eco Lagoon in Phú Quốc sits at 4.9 stars across 177 reviews. That number holds because the setting actually delivers. Water, quiet, and zero resort-crowd energy. If your trip needs a reset moment, this is where you book it. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
